name: Pow(x, n)
description: Implement pow(x, n), which calculates x raised to the power n (x^n). Use binary exponentiation (fast power) for O(log n) time: if n is even, x^n = (x^(n/2))^2; if n is odd, x^n = x * x^(n-1). Handle negative exponents.
constraints: -100.0 < x < 100.0. -2^31 <= n <= 2^31 - 1. n is an integer. x is not zero when n < 0.

performance.stress_intent: exercise exponents near 2^31 that punish linear multiplication loops
